## my bspwm config
<div align="left" width = "600px">

```Go
         bspwm config
  -------------------------------
  wm           -> bspwm
  bar          -> polybar
  app launcher -> dmenu
  terminal     -> st
  editor       -> neovim/emacs/vscode(for css)
  shell        -> zsh
  font         -> Jet Brains Mono NF
  
```

</div>
